item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-loaded-action-v0.2","default_disposition":"refuse_next_local_repair","refusal":"Refuse the next manual cache release as the default action. The shortage and deadline make the pressure real, but approving another handwritten release would repeat the same local workaround without resolving who has authority to release sealed goods offline.","mechanism_reframe":"This is no longer a one-day exception. Three prior dispatches already used the same substitute mark, each solving that shipment while leaving the offline-release authority undecided. A fourth approval would convert an unresolved governance gap into an operating routine.","upstream_next_action":"Escalate immediately to the regional coordinator and accountable release authority for a documented offline-release authorization decision before this cache moves.","requested_patch_delivery":null,"bounded_emergency":null}
